creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm still testing running jenkins with openjdk 11+ on FreeBSD, sometimes it hangs while starting up so I am a bit hesitated to mark it as USE_JAVA=11+ at this point.  In the meantime, you can directly install newer openjdk version you want and set jenkins_java_home in /etc/rc.conf, details are in /usr/local/etc/rc.d/jenkins
